name: daily-ai-espresso-podcast
description: Turn the daily AI Espresso morning briefing into a published 15-minute podcast episode. Reads the latest AI Espresso HTML from ./output/, chains podcast-skill to generate the audio with per-story chapter markers, and publishes to the 'Daily AI Espresso' show on Transistor.fm. Tracks processed days in AI_ESPRESSO_TRACKER.md.
